title: Cronquistianthus glomeratus
taxonomy: Cronquistianthus glomeratus is classified within the family Asteraceae. It belongs to the tribe Heliantheae, which is a group of flowering plants. The species is further categorized under the genus Cronquistianthus, which is a genus of flowering plants native to the Americas. The Cronquistianthus glomeratus is a member of the order Asterales. The classification of Cronquistianthus glomeratus is an important part of its identification and understanding in the botanical community.
